
Pipelines
=========

RAFIKI-CGM Pipeline
-------------------

The flowchart below shows the general steps taken when generating mock CGM data products in RAFIKI CGM. Purple
boxes indicate steps that require user specification.

.. figure:: ../_static/images/rafiki_cgm_flowchart.drawio.svg
    :width: 100%


Generating Maps
---------------

The flowchart below shows how the RAFIKI-CGM pre-made maps are generated. For more detail on this process visit :doc:`/generatingdata` 

.. figure:: ../_static/images/makingmaps.drawio.svg
    :width: 100%
